title: Module 1
content:
Wave shaping circuits: Sinusoidal and non sinusoidal wave shapes,
Principle and working of RC differentiating and integrating circuits,
Applications of RC integrator and differentiator. Clipping circuits - Positive,
negative and biased clipper. Clamping circuits - Positive, negative and biased
clamper. Voltage multipliers- Voltage doubler and  tripler.
Batteries - types - comparison

title: Module 2
content:
Regulated Power Supplies: Review of simple Zener Voltage regulator,
Shunt and series voltage regulator  using transistors, 3 pin regulators-78XX
and 79XX, IC 723  and its use as low and high voltage regulators.
Optoelectronic devices: Construction - Operation - Characteristics of
LED, Photodiode, Phototransistors.

title: Module 3
content:
Amplifiers : Introduction to Transistor Biasing, Operating point, concept of
load line, thermal stability,voltage divider bias. RC coupled amplifier -
voltage gain and frequency response. Multistage amplifiers - effect of
cascading on gain and bandwidth

title: Module 4
content:
Operational amplifier: Differential Amplifier, Characteristics of op-amps
(gain, bandwidth, slew rate, CMRR, offset voltage, offset current),
comparison of  ideal and practical op-amp (IC 741)
Applications of op amps- scale changer, sign changer, adder/summing
amplifier, subtractor, integrator, differentiator, Wien bridge oscillator.
Integrated circuits: Low pass and high  pass active filters using op amp
.Circuit diagram and working of Timer IC555,  astable and monostable
multivibrators using 555.
